title: Ooty
description: Ooty, known as Udhagamandalam, is a popular hill station in the Nilgiri Hills of Tamil Nadu, India. Often referred to as the 'Queen of Hill Stations,' it is famous for its rolling hills, tea gardens, serene lakes, and a pleasant climate that remains cool throughout the year. The town is colonial in character, featuring charming bungalows, botanical gardens, and the iconic Nilgiri Mountain Railway, a UNESCO World Heritage site.
travel_methods: The best way to travel to Ooty is by taking a train to Mettupalayam and then boarding the heritage Nilgiri Mountain Railway toy train. Alternatively, one can hire a taxi or take a bus from Coimbatore (the nearest major city and airport).
best_time: March to June and September to November
